landing.hero_description: A secure platform for anonymous reporting and getting the support you need
landing.ngo_description: Manage incidents, support victims, coordinate responses

features.space_description: Your privacy and safety are our priority

dashboard.help_available: Help is available 24/7. Your safety matters.

report.title: Submit Report
report.anonymous_notice: Your report is completely anonymous unless you choose to provide contact information below.
report.description_placeholder: Tell us what happened in your own words. You can write as much or as little as you want...
report.description_help: Share what happened, when it happened, and where it happened. Use simple words and write however feels natural to you.
report.file_types: Max 10MB per file. Supported: JPG, PNG, PDF, MP4
report.category_help: This helps us connect you with the right people, but you can skip this if you want.
report.contact_optional: Optional: Provide your contact details if you want us to follow up on your report
report.accuracy_notice: By submitting this report, you acknowledge that the information provided is accurate to the best of your knowledge.

confirmation.report_sent: Your report has been sent safely
confirmation.review_notice: We will look at your report within 24 hours. You are brave for speaking up.
confirmation.what_next: What do you want to do next?
confirmation.talk_description: Chat with a helper right now
confirmation.help_description: See places that can help you
confirmation.safety_message: Help is available anytime. Your safety is important.
